theme.en: AI Demand Reprices the Entire Chip Stack

dek.en: Foundry pricing, HBM packaging, and restricted accelerators all show AI demand pushing costs and capacity decisions through the supply chain. At the same time, Cerebras and Groq face the harder question of turning differentiated silicon into durable economics.
dek.zh: 晶圆代工定价、HBM封装和受限加速器都表明，AI需求正把成本与产能决策传导至整条供应链。与此同时，Cerebras和Groq必须回答更难的问题：如何把差异化硅片转化为可持续的商业模式。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
Google taps MediaTek for a unified TPUv9 design

summary.en: Google is reportedly working with MediaTek on TPUv9 “Triggerfish,” combining a CPU and compute die in one package for both training and inference. The design would broaden MediaTek's role after the inference-focused TPUv8i and reduce the split between Google's training and inference accelerator lines, although no shipment date or performance data were disclosed.
summary.zh: 据报道，Google正与MediaTek合作开发TPUv9「Triggerfish」，在同一封装内集成CPU与计算裸片，同时面向训练和推理。继侧重推理的TPUv8i之后，这一设计将扩大MediaTek在Google TPU路线图中的角色，并缩小训练与推理产品线的分野，但报道未披露出货时间或性能数据。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
Report: TSMC price increases extend back to 7nm
title.zh: 报道称台积电涨价范围延伸至7nm

summary.en: TSMC is reportedly raising prices across much of its process portfolio, with increases reaching back to the 7nm node and catching some customers off guard. Broad-based hikes would extend AI-era cost pressure beyond leading-edge accelerators to products built on older nodes, but the report does not specify the increases or their effective dates.
summary.zh: 据报道，台积电正在上调多个制程的价格，涨价范围向成熟方向延伸至7nm，令部分客户措手不及。若涨价广泛落地，AI时代的成本压力将从先进加速器扩散到采用较旧制程的产品，但报道未说明涨幅和生效日期。

title.en: Report: TSMC cuts 28nm wafer starts by 25%
title.zh: 报道称台积电削减25%的28nm晶圆投片量

summary.en: A report says TSMC has reduced 28nm wafer starts by 25%, potentially opening room for UMC to gain foundry share. This is a mature-node utilization decision rather than a measure of total chip output, but it could still alter availability and pricing for customers that remain on 28nm.
summary.zh: 一则报道指台积电已将28nm晶圆投片量削减25%，可能为联电争取更多代工份额创造空间。这是成熟制程的产能利用决策，并不等同于芯片总产量下降，但仍可能改变28nm客户面对的供给与价格。

title.en: Memory
JEDEC approves SPHBM4 packaging standard

summary.en: JEDEC has approved the SPHBM4 standard, creating a broader packaging path for HBM4 and improving the prospects for glass substrates. Standardization matters because it can widen the set of interoperable packaging choices as HBM4 stacks become more complex, though the item provides no adoption timetable.
summary.zh: JEDEC已批准SPHBM4标准，为HBM4提供更广的封装路径，并提升玻璃基板的应用前景。随着HBM4堆叠日益复杂，标准化有望扩大可互操作的封装选择，但报道未给出采用时间表。

title.en: Report: SK hynix slows HBM4 expansion as Rubin outlook weakens
title.zh: 报道称Rubin前景转弱，SK hynix放缓HBM4扩产

summary.en: A Korean-media report cited by Moomoo says Nvidia may cut Rubin production and SK hynix is slowing HBM4 capacity expansion, contributing to a selloff in memory shares. If confirmed, the shift would challenge assumptions of uninterrupted HBM expansion; the item includes neither company confirmation nor revised production volumes.
summary.zh: Moomoo援引韩国媒体称，Nvidia可能削减Rubin产量，SK hynix则在放缓HBM4扩产，由此引发存储股下跌。若获证实，这一变化将挑战HBM产能持续快速扩张的预期；但该报道既无公司确认，也未提供调整后的产量数据。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
ASML joins TNO's Eindhoven photonics factory
title.zh: ASML加入TNO埃因霍温光子工厂

summary.en: ASML has joined TNO's photonics factory in Eindhoven, extending its participation into a shared development environment for integrated photonics. The move matters because photonic process integration and manufacturing tools are moving closer to industrial qualification, although the item gives no investment or capacity figures.
summary.zh: ASML已加入TNO位于埃因霍温的光子工厂，进入集成光子学的共享开发环境。此举表明光子工艺集成与制造工具正进一步接近产业化验证，但报道未披露投资额或产能数据。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
Restricted Nvidia chips double in price on China's black market
title.zh: 受限Nvidia芯片在中国黑市价格翻倍

summary.en: Nvidia AI accelerators covered by U.S. export restrictions are reportedly selling for twice their original price on China's black market. The premium shows that controls are constraining lawful supply without eliminating demand, increasing both procurement costs and incentives for diversion.
summary.zh: 据报道，受美国出口限制的Nvidia AI加速器在中国黑市的售价已达到原价的两倍。这一溢价表明管制压缩了合规供应，却没有消除需求，同时推高了采购成本与转运套利的激励。

title.en: The Netherlands joins the U.S. Pax Silica alliance
title.zh: 荷兰加入美国Pax Silica联盟

summary.en: The Netherlands has joined the U.S.-led AI alliance Pax Silica despite continuing disputes involving ASML. Dutch participation brings the country that anchors advanced lithography into a wider supply-chain coordination framework, giving future equipment-policy discussions greater industrial weight.
summary.zh: 尽管围绕ASML的争议仍在持续，荷兰仍加入了美国主导的AI联盟Pax Silica。荷兰掌握先进光刻产业的关键环节，其参与使这一供应链协调框架更具产业分量，也将影响后续设备政策讨论。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
Besi raises long-term targets on AI packaging demand
title.zh: AI封装需求推动Besi上调长期目标

summary.en: BE Semiconductor Industries raised its long-term revenue and profitability targets, citing an AI-driven demand boost. The reset signals that management expects advanced-packaging demand to persist beyond the current cycle, although the available item does not state the new target values or timetable.
summary.zh: BE Semiconductor Industries以AI需求上升为由，上调了长期营收与盈利能力目标。这次调整表明管理层预计先进封装需求将延续至本轮周期之后，但现有报道未列出新目标数值或时间表。

title.en: Cerebras revenue rises 92% as its quarterly loss reaches $14 million
title.zh: Cerebras营收增长92%，季度净亏损达1400万美元

summary.en: Cerebras reported 92% revenue growth and a $14 million net loss in its first quarterly report after going public. The growth demonstrates demand for its systems, but the continuing loss keeps attention on margins and the cost of scaling a wafer-scale computing business.
summary.zh: Cerebras在上市后的首份季度财报中录得92%的营收增长，同时净亏损1400万美元。增长证明其系统存在需求，但持续亏损使市场继续关注利润率，以及扩张晶圆级计算业务所需的成本。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
Cerebras reaches a multi-year agreement with OpenAI

summary.en: An SEC filing indicates that Cerebras has reached a multi-year agreement with OpenAI. A named, production-scale customer is an important validation for Cerebras' wafer-scale platform, but the available report gives no contract value, deployment volume, or service scope.
summary.zh: 一份SEC申报文件显示，Cerebras已与OpenAI达成多年协议。具名的大规模客户是对Cerebras晶圆级平台的重要验证，但现有报道未披露合同金额、部署规模或服务范围。

title.en: Groq raises $650 million to emphasize inference cloud services
title.zh: Groq融资6.5亿美元，重心转向推理云服务

summary.en: Groq reportedly raised $650 million as it shifts emphasis from selling chips toward operating an AI inference cloud. The funding gives Groq more capacity to deploy its own hardware, but the model also raises capital requirements and makes service utilization—not benchmark speed—the key economic test.
summary.zh: 据报道，Groq融资6.5亿美元，并把业务重心从芯片销售转向运营AI推理云。新资金将增强其部署自有硬件的能力，但这一模式也提高了资本需求，使服务利用率而非基准速度成为关键的商业检验。

theme.en: Memory Movement Becomes the Design Target
theme.zh: 数据搬移成为设计靶心

dek.en: This week's papers attack data movement from several levels: DRAM operations and disturbance, wafer-scale KV-cache placement, sparse NPU scheduling, and lower-energy device concepts. The strongest results pair architecture changes with measured hardware behavior or post-layout evidence, while several proposals still need silicon validation.
dek.zh: 本周论文从多个层级压缩数据搬移成本：DRAM操作与扰动、晶圆级KV-cache放置、稀疏NPU调度，以及更低能耗的器件概念。最扎实的工作把架构改动与实测硬件行为或版图后证据结合起来，而若干提案仍需硅验证。

title.en: Devices & Process
A solid-state transcapacitor as a gain element for logic and memory
title.zh: 面向逻辑与存储增益的固态跨电容器

papers.authors: A. Mathuriya, R. Kotlyar, N. Reynolds, et al.

summary.en: The paper proposes a three-terminal solid-state transcapacitor that modulates displacement current by controlling the channel's charge-voltage relationship. By avoiding dissipative transport current and the usual Boltzmann current-modulation limit, the concept targets lower voltage and charge for logic, memory access, and on-chip interconnects. This is a preprint-level device proposal; the candidate abstract provides no measured silicon or manufacturability evidence.
summary.zh: 论文提出一种三端固态跨电容器，通过控制通道的电荷—电压关系来调制位移电流。该概念试图避开耗散性输运电流和常规Boltzmann电流调制极限，从而降低逻辑、存储访问与片上互连所需的电压和电荷。该工作仍是预印本阶段的器件提案，候选摘要未提供实测硅片或可制造性证据。

title.en: Circuits, Architecture & Reliability
ColumnKeeper mitigates column-wide DRAM disturbance

papers.authors: A. K. Kakolyris, F. N. Bostanci, A. Olgun, et al.

summary.en: ColumnKeeper is the first mitigation proposed for ColumnDisturb, a read-disturbance effect that spans columns across three consecutive DRAM subarrays rather than a few neighboring rows. Its deterministic variant tracks odd- and even-column activations with two counters per subarray and triggers targeted refresh, while a probabilistic variant trades fixed guarantees for configurable overhead. The work directly addresses a new reliability and security surface, but the available abstract does not expose full-system overhead numbers.
summary.zh: ColumnKeeper是首个针对ColumnDisturb提出的缓解方案；这种读扰动不是局限于相邻行，而是沿列影响连续3个DRAM子阵列。其确定性版本为每个子阵列用两个计数器跟踪奇数列与偶数列激活，并触发定向刷新；概率版本则以可配置开销换取概率性保障。该工作直接回应了新的可靠性与安全攻击面，但现有摘要未给出完整系统开销数据。

title.en: DejaVu shows write history changes DRAM disturbance susceptibility
title.zh: DejaVu揭示写入历史会改变DRAM扰动敏感性

papers.authors: H. Luo, İ. E. Yüksel, A. Olgun, et al.

summary.en: Experiments on 112 commercial DDR4 chips from all three major manufacturers show that a row's prior write pattern changes its read-disturbance threshold. Overwriting with opposite data lowers the minimum aggressor activation count needed for a bit flip, while writing the same data twice raises it; the team also observes effects in 32-row majority operations using processing-in-DRAM. The mechanism remains hypothesis-driven, but the broad COTS sample makes the reliability result difficult to dismiss as a single-vendor artifact.
summary.zh: 对3家主要厂商共112颗商用DDR4芯片的实验表明，存储行此前的写入模式会改变其读扰动阈值。用相反数据覆写会降低触发位翻转所需的最小攻击行激活次数，而连续两次写入相同数据会提高阈值；团队还在采用DRAM内处理的32行多数操作中观察到影响。其物理机制仍停留在假设层面，但广泛的商用样本使该结果难以被归因于单一厂商特性。

title.en: An active interposer becomes the root of trust for 2.5D chiplets
title.zh: 主动式中介层成为2.5D chiplet的信任根

papers.authors: C. Williams, M. Nabeel, G. Chacon, et al.

summary.en: This perspective organizes 2.5D chiplet threats around interconnect attacks, cache-coherence exploits, and microarchitectural side channels, then places an active silicon interposer at the system's root of trust. The architecture is intended to police chiplets and links sourced from mutually untrusted vendors rather than assuming any one die is authoritative. It is a security survey and design argument, not a measured implementation, so its area, latency, and verification costs remain open.
summary.zh: 这篇观点论文将2.5D chiplet威胁归纳为互连攻击、缓存一致性利用和微架构侧信道，并把主动式硅中介层置于系统信任根位置。该架构旨在监管来自彼此不可信供应商的chiplet与链路，而不是默认某颗裸片天然可信。论文属于安全综述与设计论证，并非实测实现，因此面积、时延和验证成本仍待回答。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
MOCAP balances KV memory for wafer-scale long-context prefill
title.zh: MOCAP为晶圆级长上下文预填充均衡KV存储

papers.authors: Z. Wang, H. Wang, Y. Xiao, et al.

summary.en: MOCAP targets long-context, prefill-only LLM inference on wafer-scale chips, where causal KV-cache growth creates both memory and pipeline imbalance across sequence chunks. Its memory-balanced KV reallocation and chunked pipeline redistribute state and work so later chunks do not overwhelm individual stages. The architecture addresses a real wafer-scale bottleneck, but the candidate abstract does not provide enough benchmark detail to judge gains across models or hardware implementations.
summary.zh: MOCAP面向晶圆级芯片上的长上下文、纯预填充LLM推理，解决因因果KV-cache持续增长而产生的跨序列分块存储与流水线失衡。其存储均衡KV重分配和分块流水线重新分布状态与计算，避免后续分块压垮个别阶段。该架构瞄准了真实的晶圆级瓶颈，但候选摘要缺少足够的基准细节，尚难判断其在不同模型与硬件实现上的收益。

title.en: Clutch accelerates vector-scalar comparison inside DRAM
title.zh: Clutch在DRAM内部加速向量—标量比较

papers.authors: D. Tokuda, T. Kubo, I. E. Yuksel, et al.

summary.en: Clutch recodes vector values as temporal sequences of leading ones so a scalar comparison becomes a lookup-like DRAM row access rather than a long bit-serial command sequence. Chunked temporal coding is used to contain the otherwise prohibitive lookup-table footprint while preserving the data-movement advantage of processing-using-DRAM. The method is promising for databases and ML filters, but the available abstract does not establish production-DRAM support or measured silicon results.
summary.zh: Clutch把向量值重编码为前导1的时间序列，使标量比较转化为类似查表的DRAM行访问，而不再需要冗长的位串行命令序列。分块时间编码用于控制原本难以接受的查找表容量，同时保留DRAM内处理减少数据搬移的优势。该方法适合数据库和ML筛选操作，但现有摘要未证明量产DRAM支持，也未给出实测硅结果。

title.en: NeutronSparse coordinates heterogeneous NPU engines for SpMM

papers.authors: X. Ai, Z. Ling, H. Yuan, et al.

summary.en: NeutronSparse addresses sparse matrix multiplication on Ascend 910B, where the official MindSpore implementation reaches only 36.3% of cuSPARSE performance on an Nvidia A100. It partitions work across heterogeneous NPU compute units according to sparsity and reorganizes tiles for locality, treating coordination rather than raw arithmetic as the primary bottleneck. The comparison spans different accelerators and software stacks, so the headline gap should not be read as a hardware-only result.
summary.zh: NeutronSparse针对Ascend 910B上的稀疏矩阵乘法；官方MindSpore实现的性能仅达到Nvidia A100上cuSPARSE的36.3%。它依据稀疏度在异构NPU计算单元间划分负载，并按局部性重组tile，把协同效率而非原始算力视为首要瓶颈。由于比较跨越不同加速器与软件栈，这一性能差距不能简单解读为纯硬件结论。

title.en: AI Research for Hardware
A roofline-inspired model predicts transformer fine-tuning energy
title.zh: 受Roofline启发的模型预测Transformer微调能耗

summary.en: The paper models multi-GPU transformer-training energy using lightweight proxies for computation, memory traffic, and hardware efficiency derived from measured BERT sweeps. A speedup-based factor captures the effects of tensor parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism across heterogeneous configurations. The scaling law is useful for system planning, but its transfer to other model families, accelerators, and communication topologies still needs validation.
summary.zh: 论文利用实测BERT配置扫描，以计算量、存储流量和硬件效率的轻量代理来建模多GPU Transformer训练能耗。一个基于加速比的因子用于刻画张量并行和全分片数据并行在异构配置中的影响。该缩放定律可用于系统规划，但能否迁移到其他模型家族、加速器和通信拓扑仍需验证。

title.en: Quantum Computing
T-junction shuttling improves scaling in 2D ion-trap processors
title.zh: T形结穿梭提升二维离子阱处理器扩展性

papers.authors: J. Durandau, C. A. Brunet, F. Schmidt-Kaler, et al.

summary.en: The study assigns separate costs to linear and junction ion shuttling, then evaluates QFT, carry, adder, shift, and comparator building blocks on one- and two-dimensional segmented traps. When junction and linear moves are assigned equal transport cost, the 2D architecture outperforms the 1D trap and its advantage grows with ion count. The conclusion is architectural rather than experimental and depends strongly on the assumed relative cost and fidelity of T-junction transport.
summary.zh: 研究分别为直线与结点离子穿梭建立成本模型，并在一维和二维分段离子阱上评估QFT、进位、加法、移位与比较器等基本模块。当结点移动与直线移动被赋予相同运输成本时，二维架构优于一维架构，且优势随离子数增加。该结论属于架构分析而非实验演示，并高度依赖T形结运输相对成本与保真度的假设。

title.en: Electronic Design Automation
Height-quantized rows automate analog layout synthesis
title.zh: 高度量化行实现模拟版图自动综合

papers.authors: Endalk Y. Gebru, Ramprasath S., Ramesh Harjani, et al.

summary.en: The flow maps analog building blocks into optimized, height-quantized rows to cope with restrictive rules and layout-dependent effects at advanced nodes. Across several test cases, it retains post-layout performance comparable to less-constrained custom baselines while reducing the schematic-to-post-layout gap by as much as 68.5% and area by up to 24.1%. These are post-layout results rather than measured silicon, so robustness across PDKs and larger mixed-signal blocks remains unproven.
summary.zh: 该流程把模拟基本模块映射到经过优化的高度量化行，以应对先进制程的严格设计规则与版图相关效应。在多个测试用例中，其版图后性能与约束较少的定制基线相当，同时把原理图到版图后的性能差距最多缩小68.5%，面积最多降低24.1%。这些仍是版图后结果而非实测硅片，其跨PDK和更大规模混合信号模块的稳健性尚未得到证明。
